evidence_boundary: Aggregates paper-reported limitations and project-level failure/fix records. Not a live reproduction failure study.

cases.summary: The acceptance was workshop-level rather than main-conference-level, and only one of three AI-generated submissions was accepted.
cases.impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.
cases.resolution: Preserve in generated skill failure cases and source maps; do not convert into a success claim.

cases.summary: The system does not consistently reach workshop-level quality and is not yet at top-tier conference standards.
cases.impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.
cases.resolution: Preserve in generated skill failure cases and source maps; do not convert into a success claim.

cases.summary: The paper identifies remaining challenges in producing genuinely novel, high-impact hypotheses, designing innovative experiments, and rigorously justifying choices with deep domain expertise.
cases.impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.
cases.resolution: Preserve in generated skill failure cases and source maps; do not convert into a success claim.

cases.summary: The authors observed citation inaccuracies and insufficient methodological rigor in generated manuscripts.
cases.impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.
cases.resolution: Preserve in generated skill failure cases and source maps; do not convert into a success claim.

cases.summary: Ethical handling required IRB approval, reviewer disclosure, organizer coordination, and withdrawal of the accepted AI-generated paper before publication.
cases.impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.
cases.resolution: Preserve in generated skill failure cases and source maps; do not convert into a success claim.

cases.summary: Reflexion can still get stuck in local minima and has no formal guarantee of success.
cases.impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.
cases.resolution: Preserve in generated skill failure cases and source maps; do not convert into a success claim.

cases.summary: The memory component is limited to a sliding window in the paper, and the authors suggest more advanced structures for future work.
cases.impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.
cases.resolution: Preserve in generated skill failure cases and source maps; do not convert into a success claim.

cases.summary: Some environments and tasks remain difficult, especially where very creative behavior or richer interaction is required.
cases.impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.
cases.resolution: Preserve in generated skill failure cases and source maps; do not convert into a success claim.

cases.summary: Kaggle holdout sets may differ from official private test sets, so percentile scores may not always be directly comparable.
cases.impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.
cases.resolution: Preserve in generated skill failure cases and source maps; do not convert into a success claim.

cases.summary: There is possible data contamination because models may have seen competition-related data; the paper says live competition submissions are the only way to fully ensure no contamination.
cases.impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.
cases.resolution: Preserve in generated skill failure cases and source maps; do not convert into a success claim.

cases.summary: AIDE can adopt a simple greedy policy that may lead to local optima on challenging R&D tasks.
cases.impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.
cases.resolution: Preserve in generated skill failure cases and source maps; do not convert into a success claim.

cases.summary: AIDE fell short in environments requiring larger codebases or single improvements with multiple steps of interaction; in Rust CodeContests it repeated local patches instead of discovering new strategies.
cases.impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.
cases.resolution: Preserve in generated skill failure cases and source maps; do not convert into a success claim.

cases.summary: While AIDE was developed for tabular machine-learning tasks, third-party experiments suggest the approach can generalize to neural architecture search, Triton Kernel optimization, and other AI R&D tasks.
cases.impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.
cases.resolution: Preserve in generated skill failure cases and source maps; do not convert into a success claim.

cases.summary: LLM inference cost can reach approximately 2.50 USD for some tasks, although most Weco-Kaggle tasks stay under 1.50 USD in the reported GPT-4 Turbo pricing setup.
cases.impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.
cases.resolution: Preserve in generated skill failure cases and source maps; do not convert into a success claim.

cases.summary: Initial extraction split multiline Markdown list items and inferred the title incorrectly as `Methods`.
cases.impact: Could fragment workflow steps and mislabel generated skills.
cases.resolution: Merged continuation lines and inferred title from the first H1 or LaTeX title.

cases.summary: The first source-map-aware audit mis-mapped section groups and incorrectly yielded unsupported rate 1.0 for all skills.
cases.impact: Would erase the distinction between source-backed skills and abstract-only seeds.
cases.resolution: Mapped skill sections onto source-note section groups before scoring.

cases.summary: PDF form-feed characters shifted source-span anchors when Python `splitlines()` was used.
cases.impact: Could mark valid line anchors invalid or point reviewers to the wrong spans.
cases.resolution: Switched source-span counting to newline-delimited lines.

cases.summary: AIDE exposed that workflow, validation, and failure candidate limits were too low and dropped data-preview plus LLM-cost content.
cases.impact: Important operational and economic limitations could be omitted from generated skills.
cases.resolution: Raised candidate limits from 6/5/5 to 8/7/6 and added a regression test.

cases.summary: The OpenAI-compatible endpoint listed models but chat completions repeatedly returned account-pool or HTTP 503 errors.
cases.impact: Live cross-harness transfer runs are prepared but cannot be executed yet.
cases.resolution: Recorded prompt packets and kept live claims downgraded to offline readiness until provider availability recovers.

cases.summary: Human-fidelity review packets and annotation summary are prepared, but all 18 score rows remain pending.
cases.impact: The paper cannot claim expert-validated semantic fidelity.
cases.resolution: Prepared packets, blank annotation template, and summarizer; kept human-validation claims out of the draft.
